summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FR/EN language toggle feature (i18n). All 7 test scenarios passed successfully. Language toggle button works correctly, translations are accurate across Dashboard, Products, and Picking pages, and language preference persists in localStorage across page refreshes.

issues: Module not found warning for 'rrweb' - non-blocking, app works correctly

passed_tests: Language toggle button visible in navbar with Globe icon
Toggle shows 'EN' when in French mode, 'FR' when in English mode
Dashboard page title translates: 'Tableau de bord' ↔ 'Dashboard'
Dashboard stats cards translate: 'Produits totaux' ↔ 'Total Products', 'Stock critique' ↔ 'Critical Stock', etc.
Navbar menu items translate correctly when switching languages
Products page translates: 'Produits' ↔ 'Products', 'Ajouter un produit' ↔ 'Add Product'
Picking page translates: 'Prélèvement (Picking)' ↔ 'Picking', 'Scanner un produit' ↔ 'Scan a product'
Language preference persists in localStorage under key 'chrono_dmi_language'
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.js is well-structured with comprehensive translations for both FR and EN
All pages correctly use the useLanguage hook and t() function for translations
Language toggle button has proper accessibility with title attribute for tooltip
localStorage persistence is correctly implemented with useEffect
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n feature fully tested and working. Language toggle button is in the navbar header next to 'Chrono DMI' title. All major pages (Dashboard, Products, Picking) have been verified for correct translations. localStorage key is 'chrono_dmi_language' with values 'fr' or 'en'.
